topic: scale and tuner activation slider shows middle state after installation
summary: After installation of scale and tuner, the plugin activation slider on the plugin page shows an intermediate/middle state instead of clear on/off.

requests.summary: Investigate and fix the post-install plugin activation state so the plugin page slider no longer shows an in-between state after installation.
constraints: preserve exact user-observed symptom: slider shows middle state, not on and not off
Codex must determine the correct internal component/branch mapping if repo naming differs from owner wording
fix should work after installation without manual corrective steps on the Pi shell
acceptance: after installation, the plugin page activation slider shows a valid stable state
state is clearly on or clearly off, never intermediate
state remains consistent after install/enable flow
